post_s10_caveat.required_s11_rule: Direct post-merge truth commits require fresh workflow_dispatch proof on main before being treated as CI-verified.

selected_next_mission.title: S11 — One-Accept Mission Executor
selected_next_mission.purpose: Build a real GitHub-native mission executor so one approved mission lease can complete routine repo/build/proof/repair/merge work without repeated operator confirmations.

next_action: Merge compact S11 prep green, then implement S11 from docs/S11_ONE_ACCEPT_MISSION_EXECUTOR.md on build/s11-one-accept-mission-executor.
do_not_reopen: S9 One-Drop Build Accelerator naming and purpose
S10 Assistant Optimization Layer naming and purpose
no prompt docs unless explicitly requested
safety_boundary: Future work must remain public-safe. No hidden autonomy, browser-cookie/session-token automation, secrets, paid compute, production deployment, database mutation, account permission changes, validator weakening, schema weakening, proof weakening, or GitHub permission bypass.
resume_prompt: Resume StealthEye Cloud from current repo state. S11 is selected as One-Accept Mission Executor. If compact prep is merged, implement from docs/S11_ONE_ACCEPT_MISSION_EXECUTOR.md on build/s11-one-accept-mission-executor.
